rows.label: tev025301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Eleonora if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about BLADE missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about BLADE missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0191
rows.name: Ask Eleonora if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about BLADE missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about Lu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Doll found in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the casualties suffered in the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0141
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the number on BLADE Tower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0151
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0161
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0171
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_SEL0181
rows.name: Ask Eleonora about the duties of BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0001
rows.name:
This is Quest Board. As a
BLADE, you can... Hmm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh! I see that you haven't
yet registered as a BLADE, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, if you do register and
join a Union, you'll be able
to accept missions right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0004
rows.name:
I understand that you haven't yet
decided what role you wish to play
here in NLA, and that's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0005
rows.name:
But I believe you would
make a splendid BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0006
rows.name:
Trust me, I've seen off countless
BLADEs standing right here. I
know talent when I see it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0008
rows.name:
My name is Eleonora, and I
serve as BLADE's receptionist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you have any questions about your
assignments, feel free to ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0011
rows.name:
If there is anything that I can do to
help, I hope you'll let me be of service.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Now go do your best, [ST:playername ]! I
expect great things from you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0020
rows.name:
BLADEs must join a Union before
they're able to use Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Once you have completed your data
probe installation mission, you
should be ready to select a Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0022
rows.name:
At that point, please come speak to
me again. I'm sure I will have
something that strikes your fancy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Are you worried about me? Oh,
thank you. I'm touched by the
concern, but I'm fine. Really.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Maybe it would be better if you posed
that same question to the people of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0029
rows.name:
I am sure there are many who are troubled by
something, but don't consider it significant
enough to make a formal request of BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Your training just ended, but
you're already being sent out to
track down Nelson's missing team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Commander Vandham must have
taken quite a shine to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0041
rows.name:
That man asks a great deal of his BLADEs,
but he only makes such requests to the
ones he believes are up to the task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Nelson's team was in the southeast part of
Primordial Wilderness when we lost contact with
them. I wish you the best of luck with your search.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0043
rows.name:
Oh, but I should mention one thing—if you're willing
to pursue multiple missions at the same time, take
a look at Quest Board before heading out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0058
rows.name:
Welcome back, [ST:playername ]. I hope your
search was successful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0059
rows.name:
If you're ready to report, please
speak directly with Commander
Vandham in the BLADE Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0060
rows.name:
I know he was eager to assess your
performance on this task personally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0077
rows.name:
Welcome back, [ST:playername ]. Have you become
accustomed to BLADE work?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0078
rows.name:
If you've gained confidence in your abilities, perhaps
this would be a good time to challenge yourself by paying
a visit to Nightglow Forest far northwest of NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0079
rows.name:
We've yet to make any significant
progress installing data
probes in that region.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0080
rows.name:
And expanding FrontierNet may allow us to
witness some significant development.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0081
rows.name:
But of course, if you don't believe you're ready for
that yet, you can continue to acclimate yourself to
BLADE work by pursuing jobs from Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0098
rows.name:
Our newest immigrant, Lu, can
be found down Armory Alley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0099
rows.name:
It's quite heartening to have a
Miran native fighting by our side![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0100
rows.name:
Of course, he IS just one man, but I
assume he has friends or the like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0101
rows.name:
...What's that? He's the only one of his kind?
Well then, I hope he'll be able to make plenty
of friends for himself here in NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0106
rows.name: Have you visited the Ma-non ship yet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0107
rows.name:
There's a warp device directly
in front of BLADE HQ that can
take you straight to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0108
rows.name:
I couldn't begin to tell you how the
warp device works, though our mechanics
are investigating the matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0109
rows.name:
But apparently all they've been able to
ascertain is that it has no harmful effects
on our Blue Bloods. ...Or so they claim.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0110
rows.name:
Still, I can't help but wonder what would happen
if another lifeform was there at the instant you
warped. Wouldn't you end up being fused together?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0115
rows.name:
The machine that was recovered is
currently being examined at the
restricted hangar in the lower level.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0116
rows.name:
It isn't yet clear why it had been
abandoned where it was found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0117
rows.name:
But hopefully a careful
examination will provide some
clues to our enemy's objective.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0118
rows.name:
I do hope their analysis
is completed soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0125
rows.name:
I heard what happened to the
Lifepoint Archive in Valley
of Oblivion. What a tragedy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0126
rows.name:
I wonder what priceless data was stored in
that unit...? Ah, forgive me. I hope you don't
take that as criticism of your performance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0127
rows.name:
The loss of the archive brings up the
question of how much this "Growth"
organization knows about us humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0128
rows.name:
I don't like being at war with an
enemy who we know nothing about, yet
who knows a great deal about us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0135
rows.name:
The BLADEs we lost have been taken to
the Blue Blood Maintenance Center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0136
rows.name:
Commander Vandham has directed the
center to revive them if possible,
but the chances seem slim.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0137
rows.name:
If only we'd been able to make a
successful landing... And if only
we hadn't lost the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0138
rows.name:
But there is no point in regretting
the past. We must focus on what
we might yet achieve.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0139
rows.name:
Finding the Central Life is our only
hope now. Please do not fail us, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0145
rows.name:
I feel as though I've seen the leader
of the Larsians before somewhere...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0146
rows.name:
Oh! Wasn't he the one who stole that
Doll from the restricted hangar?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0147
rows.name:
I remember watching the security camera footage
with Commander Vandham and arguing over whether
the thief looked more like a cat or a dog.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0148
rows.name:
Ah, forgive me. That's...hardly
relevant to anything. I wish you
the best of luck on your missions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0153
rows.name:
The Central Life is coming perilously
close to running out of operating time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0154
rows.name:
I feel useless just sitting here, but
I'm no warrior, and I'd be a liability
were I to join in the fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0155
rows.name:
I can only put my faith
in BLADE. In you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0156
rows.name:
Please, you have to find the Central
Life before the countdown hits zero![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0161
rows.name:
We're analyzing the location
of the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0162
rows.name:
It will take some time, so perhaps
you'd like to pursue another
assignment from Quest Board?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0163
rows.name:
Ah, that's right! I've heard
from Commander Vandham that the
Doll flight tests have begun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0164
rows.name:
He had quite the grin on his face as he was
making his way to the Arms test hangar earlier.
Perhaps you should head down there yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0170
rows.name:
I understand that the analysis of the
Central Life location is nearly complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0171
rows.name:
The Director General was making
preparations for a public
address a short while ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0172
rows.name:
I assume that a new mission will
be available shortly. For now, you
should hurry back to the Home![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0177
rows.name:
A Doll with a flight module appears to
be the only means of reaching the coordinates
where the Lifepoint Core landed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0178
rows.name:
Perhaps you've noticed other areas
that could only be reached by air?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0179
rows.name:
Still, I'd ask you to make this mission
your priority. There will be plenty of time
to explore Mira once the Core is secure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0180
rows.name:
Not that I'm in any position
to stop you, of course...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0185
rows.name: Welcome back, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0186
rows.name:
I know that mission was a long and
grueling one, but it's all over
now. You've done excellent work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0187
rows.name:
Still, I hope you don't intend to declare
the job finished and return to the Home
to roll around with your pets all day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0188
rows.name:
There are still a great many
missions that await you both
here in NLA, and in Mira beyond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025301_MSG0189
rows.name:
We may not be in our Blue Bloods for long, so
this is the time to challenge all of the difficult
missions you wouldn't dare attempt otherwise.[ST:wait ]
